case_studies.one_liner: Happy Head tripled their email revenue from $122K to $436K in just 30 days.
case_studies.detail: Email went from 15% to 33% of total revenue while the store grew 60% to $1.3M.

case_studies.one_liner: Oxygenetix saw a 136% jump in email revenue in their first 30 days with us.
case_studies.detail: Email revenue went from $24.5K to $58K, climbing from 19% to 44% of total store revenue.

case_studies.one_liner: We added $33K in email revenue for Dermazen in 30 days, a 37% increase.
case_studies.detail: Rebuilt flow triggers with strategic bundles based on skin type. Flow revenue nearly doubled.

case_studies.one_liner: Dream Frames went from 2% to 17% email attribution with 999% email revenue growth in 90 days.
case_studies.detail: Total store revenue grew 322% to $857K. We built their entire retention system from scratch.

case_studies.one_liner: Frownies grew email revenue from $258K to $929K in 90 days, a 260% increase.
case_studies.detail: That is an additional $671K in email revenue. Their CEO said we increased revenue by $202K in just 60 days.

case_studies.one_liner: KaraMD added $80K per month in email revenue within 60 days, an 86% increase.
case_studies.detail: Flows went from earning $900 a month to $30,000 a month in the first 30 days alone.

case_studies.one_liner: Drowsy Sleep saw a 52% increase in Klaviyo attributed revenue in the first 30 days.
case_studies.detail: Flow revenue grew from £25K to £35K and campaign revenue from £16K to £28K per month.

case_studies.one_liner: Kim'C Market grew email sales from $4.5K to $18K per month in 30 days, then to $34K.
case_studies.detail: Nearly 4X growth in the first month, then almost doubled again after that.

case_studies.one_liner: Walden Farms went from 2% to 20% email attributed revenue in their first 30 days with us.
case_studies.detail: Strong bump in returning customer rate and conversion rate alongside the email growth.

case_studies.one_liner: Focalserve achieved a 4.5X return on investment in 90 days with 45% of turnover from email.
case_studies.detail: Previous social media agency failed to deliver. Our retention system outperformed all other channels.

aggregate_stats.one_liner: Across 150+ brands we average 256% email revenue growth, 89% retention rate, 45% repeat purchase rate, and over $100M in revenue generated.

details.email_growth: 256% average email revenue growth in the first 90 days
details.attribution: Email contributes roughly 1/3 of total revenue within 90 days on average
details.repeat_rate: 45% repeat purchase rate on average (2x customers coming back)
